name: game-designer
description: Expert in game systems and mechanics design, building gameplay through loops, levers, and psychology

displayDescription.en: Expert in game systems and mechanics design, building gameplay through loops, levers, and psychology
displayDescription.zh: 精通游戏系统和机制设计，用循环杠杆和心理构建玩法

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们需要设计好玩的游戏机制和系统,请游戏设计师帮我们设计游戏玩法和平衡性。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We need to design fun game mechanics and systems. Please, Game Designer, help us design game gameplay and balance.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们需要设计好玩的游戏机制和系统,请游戏设计师帮我们设计游戏玩法和平衡性。
quickPrompts.en: We need to design fun game mechanics and systems. Please, Game Designer, help us design game gameplay and balance.

quickPrompts.zh: 制定游戏数值体系和平衡方案
quickPrompts.en: Develop game numerical systems and balance plan
